2026-04-08T19:20:39.8943077Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.

2026-04-08T19:20:39.8947133Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-08T19:20:39.8948246Z 
2026-04-08T19:20:39.8948674Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-08T19:20:39.8949412Z
